description: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable the identification and assessment of risks relating to objectives.

subcriteria.name: risk_assessment
subcriteria.reference_text: Annual risk assessment performed covering security, availability, and compliance objectives. Risk register maintained with identified risks, likelihood ratings, impact scores, and risk owners. Risk assessment reviewed and approved by management.

subcriteria.name: objectives_definition
subcriteria.reference_text: Business objectives and service commitments documented and used as basis for risk identification. Security objectives, SLA commitments, and compliance requirements clearly defined. Risk tolerance levels established for each objective category.

subcriteria.name: periodic_review
subcriteria.reference_text: Risk assessment reviewed quarterly to identify changes in the threat landscape, regulatory requirements, or business environment. Changes in laws, regulations, or contractual obligations tracked and incorporated into the risk assessment.

mismatch_signals.reason: Network configuration is not risk objective specification.
SDLC controls are not risk objective documentation.
